constraints.name: FIRST_NAME_MAX
constraints.doc: Maximum length of a person's first (given) name.

constraints.name: MIDDLE_NAME_MAX
constraints.doc: Maximum length of a person's middle name.

constraints.name: LAST_NAME_MAX
constraints.doc: Maximum length of a person's last (family) name.

constraints.name: PREFERRED_NAME_MAX
constraints.doc: Maximum length of a person's preferred (display) name.

constraints.name: COMPANY_NAME_MAX
constraints.doc: Maximum length of a company / organization name.

constraints.name: JOB_TITLE_MAX
constraints.doc: Maximum length of a professional job title.

constraints.name: DEPARTMENT_MAX
constraints.doc: Maximum length of a department / organizational-unit name.

constraints.name: STREET_LINE_MAX
constraints.doc: Maximum length of a single street-address line.

constraints.name: CITY_MAX
constraints.doc: Maximum length of a city / locality name.

constraints.name: COMPANY_WEBSITE_MAX
constraints.doc: Maximum length of a raw company-website URL (before validation).

constraints.name: AFFIX_CUSTOM_MAX
constraints.doc: Maximum length of a custom name affix (custom prefix or suffix).

constraints.name: POSTAL_CODE_MAX
constraints.doc: Maximum length of a postal / ZIP code.

constraints.name: EMAIL_MAX
constraints.doc: Maximum length of an email address (RFC 5321 addr-spec limit).

constraints.name: PHONE_E164_MAX
constraints.doc: Maximum length of a raw phone-number string (generous E.164 ceiling).

constraints.name: PHONE_MIN_DIGITS
constraints.doc: Minimum number of digits in a valid phone number.

constraints.name: PHONE_MAX_DIGITS
constraints.doc: Maximum number of digits in a valid phone number (E.164 limit).

enums.name: NamePrefix
enums.doc: Closed list of personal-name prefixes (honorifics / titles). The Other member is the escape hatch backed by a custom free-text value.

members.name: Other
members.doc: Other prefix not in the closed list; carries a custom free-text value.

enums.name: NameSuffix
enums.doc: Closed list of personal-name suffixes (generational and ordinal). The Other member is the escape hatch backed by a custom free-text value.

members.name: Other
members.doc: Other suffix not in the closed list; carries a custom free-text value.

enums.name: BiologicalSex
enums.doc: Closed list of biological-sex classifications. Unspecified is the absence sentinel; there is no Other member.
